name: booking-microservice-nestjs
description: NestJS Monorepo with Database per Service

scripts.build:all: nest build api-gateway && nest build auth-service
scripts.prisma:migrate:auth: dotenv -e deployments/docker-compose/.env -- npx prisma migrate dev --schema=apps/auth-service/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:push:auth: dotenv -e deployments/docker-compose/.env -- npx prisma db push --schema=apps/auth-service/prisma/schema.prisma
